message:
shared,web: Store full preview text and truncate in UI

Remove 80-character truncation from preview field during ingestion,
storing the full first user prompt instead. Truncation is now handled
in the UI using CSS (truncate class) for better flexibility.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/3c0f9090-3de2-4a07-9297-8d8de4b477d9
